After heating to the desired temperature (50 - 60°C), it is recommended to test the temperature by touch before applying the pad to the affected area. The thermophore is suitable for heat therapy in subacute and chronic conditions of rheumatic origin, for non-inflammatory joint pain, muscle stiffness, joints and spine, abdominal pain, for menstrual problems, etc. The thermophore can also be cooled and used as a cold therapy for swelling, inflammation, bumps, headaches and for normal cooling during hot days....

A készülék maximális kimeneti teljesítménye 15,4 W /48 V DC. A TP-link TL-POE10R  PoE elosztóval kombinálva is használható.
